mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_tag WHERE normalized_name = #{normalizedName} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_tag(name, normalized_name, status, created_at) VALUES(#{name}, #{normalizedName}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tag.* FROM forum_thread_tag tt JOIN forum_tag tag ON tag.id = tt.tag_id WHERE tt.thread_id = #{threadId} ORDER BY tag.id ASC
